ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was last updated */,
  "scenario_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the simulation */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_scenario_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_type_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenario_types ("scenario_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the input parameter (e.g., rainfall, temperature) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the input parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the input parameter (e.g., mm, °C) */,
  "parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the parameter */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., field measurement, literature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_parameters_parameter_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_type_id") REFERENCES input_parameter_types ("parameter_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundary_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary condition */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the boundary condition (e.g., atmospheric pressure, soil moisture) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the boundary condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the boundary condition (e.g., Pa, %) */,
  "condition_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boundary condition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the condition */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the condition value (e.g., field measurement, literature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_condition_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_type_id") REFERENCES boundary_condition_types ("condition_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the time step belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the time value (e.g., s, min, h) */,
  "time_step_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the time step */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_time_step_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_type_id") REFERENCES time_step_types ("time_step_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output value */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the output belongs to */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the output belongs to */,
  "hgs_q_outlet" REAL /* HGS Q outlet value */,
  "hgs_stor_surface" REAL /* HGS stor surface value */,
  "hgs_stor_subsurface" REAL /* HGS stor subsurface value */,
  "hgs_stor_soil" REAL /* HGS stor soil value */,
  "hgs_stor_gw" REAL /* HGS stor GW value */,
  "hgs_stor_total" REAL /* HGS stor total value */,
  "output_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the output */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the output value (e.g., simulation, field measurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_output_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_type_id") REFERENCES output_types ("output_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the scenario */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., maximum HGS Q outlet value) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the result */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the result (e.g., simulation, field measurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_result_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_type_id") REFERENCES output_types ("output_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_parameter_types" (
  "parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input parameter type */,
  "parameter_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the input parameter type (e.g., rainfall, temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the input parameter type (e.g., mm, °C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundary_condition_types" (
  "condition_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary condition type */,
  "condition_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the boundary condition type (e.g., atmospheric pressure, soil moisture) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the boundary condition type (e.g., Pa, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_step_types" (
  "time_step_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step type */,
  "time_step_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the time step type (e.g., second, minute, hour) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the time step type (e.g., s, min, h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_types" (
  "output_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output type */,
  "output_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the output type (e.g., HGS Q outlet, HGS stor surface) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the output type (e.g., m³/s, m³) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_scenario_types" (
  "scenario_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation scenario type */,
  "scenario_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario type (e.g., rainfall-runoff, groundwater flow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_type_id")
)
